subtitles.original: おうちに お呼ばれしちゃったみんながね
subtitles.english: Everyone who was invited over to my house,

subtitles.original: ちょっと距離近めでね ASMRボイスが
subtitles.english: at a slightly close distance... The ASMR voice

subtitles.original: こんな感じで、まあ、ちょっと、なんか、適当なんですけど
subtitles.english: is kind of like this, well, it's a bit random,

subtitles.original: まあ、そんな感じのボイスになっております！
subtitles.english: but it's that kind of voice!

subtitles.original: こちら！数量限定じゃない！
subtitles.english: This is not limited in quantity!

subtitles.original: ので、焦らずにみんなゆっくりで大丈夫です！
subtitles.english: So there's no need to rush, you can all take your time!

subtitles.original: グッズは、22時10...ん？
subtitles.english: The merch will go on sale at 10... huh?

subtitles.original: 22時10分から販売開始です！
subtitles.english: It will go on sale starting at 10:10 PM!

subtitles.original: 直筆のサインとかもね、全部、もう何もかも数量限定じゃないので、
subtitles.english: Even the hand-signed ones, everything is not limited in quantity,

subtitles.original: あの、ずうちゃんのサインもあの、付いてきますのでね、フルセットを買ったら！
subtitles.english: so Zuu-chan's signature will be included if you buy the full set!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、よろしくお願いします！ぜひ！
subtitles.english: So everyone, thank you in advance! Please!

subtitles.original: 買ってね！
subtitles.english: Buy it, okay?

subtitles.original: いっぱい買ってね！
subtitles.english: Buy lots of it, okay?

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、以上、みにみあによるグッズ紹介でした！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, that was the merch introduction by Mini Mia!

subtitles.original: はーい！ということで、みにみあありがとう！
subtitles.english: Alright! So, thank you, Mini Mia!

subtitles.original: なんか結構ミスってたな。まあみにみあだからね。
subtitles.english: She made quite a few mistakes. Well, she is Mini Mia.

subtitles.original: すうじゃないから。仕方ないか！
subtitles.english: She's not Zuu, so I guess it can't be helped!

subtitles.original: ということで、誕生日の3Dライブはどうだったでしょうか！
subtitles.english: Anyway, how did you like my birthday 3D live?

subtitles.original: 憧れのホロライブに入ってから、みんなにいっぱい応援してもらってここまで来れました！
subtitles.english: Since joining my dream Hololive, I've received so much support to get this far!

subtitles.original: みんなに、少しでもね、かっこよかったとか、
subtitles.english: If you thought I was even a little bit cool,

subtitles.original: すうのこと応援しててよかったって思ってもらえてるととっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: or if you felt glad to support Zuu, I would be so happy!

subtitles.original: MVはこのあとすぐ公開で、リダイレクトで飛ぶので、チャンネルはそのままでよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: The MV will release right after this, and you'll be redirected, so stay on this channel!

subtitles.original: ということで、みんな！これからもよろしくね！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: With that, everyone! Please keep supporting me! Thank you!

subtitles.original: じゃ、ばいばーい！またねー！
subtitles.english: Well then, bye-bye! See you later!

subtitles.original: ずうりすへ / ずうを見つけて、応援してくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: To Zooris, / Thank you for finding and supporting Zuu!

subtitles.original: そのおかげでみんなにエネルギーをあげる / ピカピカな存在、自慢のみにみあになれるよ！
subtitles.english: Thanks to that, I can give everyone energy / and become a shining presence, a Mini Mia you can be proud of!

subtitles.original: これからもコツコツがんばっていくので / 応援してね！
subtitles.english: I'll keep working hard bit by bit, / so please keep supporting me!

subtitles.original: ずうががんばれるのはずうりすのおかげ！
subtitles.english: Zuu is able to do her best because of Zooris!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Process Summary**

Alright, let's get this done. The task is clear: transcribe and translate a Japanese VTuber video segment, creating subtitles according to specific rules. First, I need to make sure I understand the rules: accurate transcription of spoken dialogue as the primary ground truth, timecodes in the `MM:SS.mmm` format, translations that are logical, with a maximum of 50 characters per line, and no inclusion of CC tags. Silence means silence - no subtitles when there are no vocals, unless there's prominent, relevant on-screen text.

Okay, let's dive into this. I've listened carefully to the segment and transcribed the spoken dialogue, meticulously noting the timecodes. I translated each phrase, ensuring clarity and brevity, aiming for a natural flow. The first pass through the audio identified the main speech segments. I made sure to double-check my translations and listen to short sections repeatedly to confirm the timing and accuracy. I've made some improvements to ensure the timing of the translations is precise.

Now, that visual text! At 01:48, a handwritten letter appears. This fits the exception of "prominent, relevant text," so I need to subtitle it. The rule is no merging of subtitles if there is spoken dialogue. The text is visible until the end, so I've broken it down into logical segments, translating each part. I made sure to take into consideration the VTuber's nickname ("Zuu") and fan name ("Zooris") as well as to keep the format consistent.

I've double-checked everything: the timing of the audio transcription, the translations, and the visual text translation. Now, let's make sure the timecodes are accurate. I've confirmed everything follows the rules. I'm ready to output the subtitles.
